race.comment: BON VADER (4) is unlucky to still be a maiden hitting the top-four in all five career outings to date and strikes a very winnable contest here. Looks ready for the step-up in trip now and should be right there when the whips are cracking. JUSTA BARTY (12) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but the first-up placing was good enough for a race like this. Expect sharp improvement. ARCELIA (8) strips fitter third-up from the break and gets in well at the weights with the claim. Top-three candidate. KALAMIA KING (2) gets 3kg off and may trouble the judge with any luck in running. BOMB PERIGNON (11) next best out of the champion Waller barn.
